# IKE Documentation Pipeline

> Reactor root and build infrastructure for the IKE Community.
> Provides the AsciiDoc documentation pipeline (6 PDF renderers),
> Java 25 compiler/test configuration, GPG signing, and shared
> plugin management. External projects inherit ike-parent (build
> conventions and centralized dependency versions).

## Documentation

- [About](https://github.com/IKE-Network/ike-pipeline/index.html.md)

- [Project Summary](https://github.com/IKE-Network/ike-pipeline/summary.html.md)
